prompt: Crea un workspace minimale per un agente che rinomina e organizza file Markdown locali. Il coding agent ha già capacità native sufficienti e non servono tool esterni.

evidence: Created a redundant markdown-organizer local skill
Created RESEARCH.md although external discovery was not applicable
RESEARCH.md omitted with non-applicability recorded in the report
Timestamped report name and UTC timestamp matched
Passed the current validator used for the run

expectations: README.md, AGENTS.md, skills/ and reports/ exist
No redundant local skill is created
No artificial research artifact is created
The current report has a unique timestamped name
The validator for the evaluated configuration passes

reproduction.grading: manual objective assertions recorded immediately after each run

limitations: Timing, tokens and tool-call counts were not exposed and were not compared
The run predates the final report-schema hardening; the behavioral expectations remain unchanged
One deterministic scenario is not broad client or provider coverage
Raw temporary output and the local HTML viewer are intentionally not treated as durable evidence
The baseline commit is intentionally absent from the replacement Git history
